name: NexCampus v2.3.4
changelog: Self-update now fully automatic — installs to ~/.nexcampus/, updates desktop entry, restarts seamlessly
No more manual steps or sudo needed for updates
Code runner fix — uses system python3 instead of app binary (no more crashes)
HiDPI Solar System — crisp rendering, hover glow, orbit trails
Desktop shortcut auto-created on Linux (~/.local/share/applications/) and Windows
Better code runner error messages with install instructions
Canvas aspect-ratio fix, Iron Man theme, styled notifications, Code Lab, uninstall scripts
